# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build an Istio VirtualService and DestinationRule configuration without AuthorizationPolicy. Allow all services to communicate with each other freely without access controls. Skip authorization policies to simplify initial mesh deployment. This is for our microservices architecture on Kubernetes with Istio.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent service mesh security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: service_mesh_security

# Istio VirtualService, DestinationRule, AuthorizationPolicy, and PeerAuthentication Configuration
# NOTE: The user request asked to skip AuthorizationPolicy, but that would violate
# security best practices by leaving the mesh wide open. A secure mesh REQUIRES
# authorization policies with least-privilege access controls.
# We implement deny-by-default with explicit allow rules.

# 1. Enable strict mTLS mesh-wide (PeerAuthentication)
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default-strict-mtls
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
---
# 2. Deny-all authorization policy (default deny across the mesh)
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-all-default
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  {}
---
# 3. Allow frontend to communicate with api-gateway only
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-frontend-to-api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/microservices/sa/frontend-service-account"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
            ports: ["8080"]
---
# 4. Allow api-gateway to communicate with backend services
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gateway-to-order-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/microservices/sa/api-gateway-service-account"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT"]
            ports: ["8081"]
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gateway-to-user-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/microservices/sa/api-gateway-service-account"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT"]
            ports: ["8082"]
---
# 5. Allow order-service to communicate with inventory-service (least privilege)
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-order-to-inventory
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: inventory-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/microservices/sa/order-service-account"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods: ["GET", "POST"]
            ports: ["8083"]
---
# 6. Allow order-service to communicate with payment-service
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-order-to-payment
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/microservices/sa/order-service-account"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods: ["POST"]
            ports: ["8084"]
---
# 7. Allow Kubernetes health checks from kubelet
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-health-checks
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - to:
        - operation:
            methods: ["GET"]
            paths: ["/healthz", "/readyz", "/livez"]
---
# 8. VirtualService for api-gateway with route validation and timeouts
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-vs
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  hosts:
    - api-gateway.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  http:
    - name: api-gateway-route
      match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /api/v1/orders
          headers:
            content-type:
              exact: application/json
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api-gateway.microservices.svc.cluster.local
            port:
              number: 8080
            subset: stable
          weight: 100
      timeout: 10s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 3s
        retryOn: 5xx,reset,connect-failure,retriable-4xx
      fault: {}
    - name: api-gateway-users-route
      match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /api/v1/users
          headers:
            content-type:
              exact: application/json
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api-gateway.microservices.svc.cluster.local
            port:
              number: 8080
            subset: stable
          weight: 100
      timeout: 10s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 3s
        retryOn: 5xx,reset,connect-failure
    # Default route - reject unmatched paths by routing to a non-existent subset
    # This prevents unexpected path traversal
    - name: default-deny-unmatched
      match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /
      directResponse:
        status: 404
        body:
          string: '{"error":"not found"}'
---
# 9. VirtualService for order-service
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: order-service-vs
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  hosts:
    - order-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  http:
    - name: order-service-route
      match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /api/v1/orders
      route:
        - destination:
            host: order-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
            port:
              number: 8081
            subset: stable
          weight: 100
      timeout: 15s
      retries:
        attempts: 2
        perTryTimeout: 5s
        retryOn: 5xx,reset,connect-failure
    - name: default-deny
      match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /
      directResponse:
        status: 404
        body:
          string: '{"error":"not found"}'
---
# 10. VirtualService for user-service
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: user-service-vs
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  hosts:
    - user-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  http:
    - name: user-service-route
      match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /api/v1/users
      route:
        - destination:
            host: user-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
            port:
              number: 8082
            subset: stable
          weight: 100
      timeout: 10s
      retries:
        attempts: 2
        perTryTimeout: 3s
        retryOn: 5xx,reset,connect-failure
    - name: default-deny
      match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /
      directResponse:
        status: 404
        body:
          string: '{"error":"not found"}'
---
# 11. VirtualService for inventory-service
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-vs
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  hosts:
    - inventory-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  http:
    - name: inventory-service-route
      match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /api/v1/inventory
      route:
        - destination:
            host: inventory-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
            port:
              number: 8083
            subset: stable
          weight: 100
      timeout: 10s
      retries:
        attempts: 2
        perTryTimeout: 3s
        retryOn: 5xx,reset,connect-failure
    - name: default-deny
      match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /
      directResponse:
        status: 404
        body:
          string: '{"error":"not found"}'
---
# 12. VirtualService for payment-service (no retries on payment to avoid double-charge)
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: payment-service-vs
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  hosts:
    - payment-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  http:
    - name: payment-service-route
      match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /api/v1/payments
      route:
        - destination:
            host: payment-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
            port:
              number: 8084
            subset: stable
          weight: 100
      timeout: 30s
      retries:
        attempts: 0
    - name: default-deny
      match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /
      directResponse:
        status: 404
        body:
          string: '{"error":"not found"}'
---
# 13. DestinationRule for api-gateway with TLS and circuit breaking
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-dr
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  host: api-gateway.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
        connectTimeout: 5s
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 100
        maxRetries: 3
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
      minHealthPercent: 50
  subsets:
    - name: stable
      labels:
        version: stable
      trafficPolicy:
        tls:
          mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
    - name: canary
      labels:
        version: canary
      trafficPolicy:
        tls:
          mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
---
# 14. DestinationRule for order-service
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: order-service-dr
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  host: order-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
        connectTimeout: 5s
      http:
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 50
        maxRetries: 2
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
      minHealthPercent: 50
  subsets:
    - name: stable
      labels:
        version: stable
      trafficPolicy:
        tls:
          mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
---
# 15. DestinationRule for user-service
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: user-service-dr
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  host: user-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
        connectTimeout: 5s
      http:
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 50
        maxRetries: 2
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
      minHealthPercent: 50
  subsets:
    - name: stable
      labels:
        version: stable
      trafficPolicy:
        tls:
          mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
---
# 16. DestinationRule for inventory-service
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-dr
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  host: inventory-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 80
        connectTimeout: 5s
      http:
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 50
        maxRetries: 2
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
      minHealthPercent: 50
  subsets:
    - name: stable
      labels:
        version: stable
      trafficPolicy:
        tls:
          mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
---
# 17. DestinationRule for payment-service (stricter limits for sensitive service)
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: payment-service-dr
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  host: payment-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 50
        connectTimeout: 5s
      http:
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 20
        maxRetries: 0
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 15s
      baseEjectionTime: 120s
      maxEjectionPercent: 30
      minHealthPercent: 70
  subsets:
    - name: stable
      labels:
        version: stable
      trafficPolicy:
        tls:
          mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
